items.description: Array of radio button items with label, value, and optional disabled property

onChange.description: Change event handler - receives ComponentEvent with selected value

name.description: Name attribute for the radio group

args.description: Custom arguments passed through to onChange event

ariaLabelledBy.description: ID of the element that labels the radiogroup

ariaDescribedBy.description: ID(s) of element(s) that describe the radiogroup (hint or error text). Auto-set by FieldLabel.

invalid.description: Marks the group as invalid (sets aria-invalid)
